title: Show geographic location data for existing video views

requirements.summary: Display geographic view breakdown for all existing video views in the admin Video Management Panel, including views recorded before geographic tracking was added, with unknown countries labeled as 'Unknown'
acceptanceCriteria: The geographic breakdown panel in VideoManagementPanel.tsx renders for any video whose view records exist in the backend, including records created before geographic tracking was added.
View records with a missing, empty, or null country value are grouped and displayed under an 'Unknown' label in the breakdown panel.
The breakdown is sorted by view count descending, with 'Unknown' entries included in the sort.
No new views are required for the panel to appear — existing view records alone are sufficient to trigger display.
The panel remains visible only to admin users.

file_operations.description: Update the geographic breakdown logic to handle all view records returned by getViewRecords, including those with missing, empty, or null country data. Group records with missing country information under an 'Unknown' label. Ensure the breakdown panel displays for any video with existing view records, regardless of when they were recorded. Sort the breakdown by view count in descending order, including 'Unknown' entries in the sort. The panel must remain admin-only and leverage the existing useGetViewRecords hook without modification.
